episodes.title: I was in a single family cult
episodes.description:
If you’re deconstructing from a single-family cult, a high-control family system, or just trying to understand how manipulation and conditioning work, Daniela Mestyanek Young’s work is worth your time.

Her book + workbook bundle is on sale right now for $58, and I’m currently working through it. Supporting her work is also a way of supporting yourself — your healing, your clarity, and your ability to name what happened to you.

Sometimes understanding is part of freedom. #DaniellaMestyanekYoung #Uncultured #Deconstruction #HealingJourney #estrangedparents #estranged
